summary: Restore and maintain the full previous app (v18), updating only the OCR to a real online OCR integration and applying a purple color theme across all pages/buttons without changing other screens/features.
architectural_notes: Keep existing v18 app screens/features unchanged; only modify OCR implementation and global theme styling.
Real OCR requires calling an external OCR API with a free-tier quota (monthly request limits may apply).
known_issues: Current OCR is not working and shows an offline-mode message instead of performing real text extraction.

existing_features.title: Replace the current OCR “Offline Mode” placeholder flow with a real online OCR integration using a legal free-tier external OCR API (OCR.space) so that selecting an image/PDF and clicking “Extract Questions” performs actual text extraction and proceeds to the existing review/approve flow.

Update the OCR session utility currently named/mock-behaving as a mock extractor so it supports storing sessions created from real OCR results (extracted text + parsed questions) while keeping the existing session load/clear/convert APIs used by the OCR review screen.

Ensure a consistent purple theme across the entire app (all pages and buttons) by verifying that primary/secondary/accent tokens and button variants visually render as purple consistently in both light and dark mode, without changing layout or features.

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrate real OCR using a legal free-tier external OCR API (e.g., OCR.space) via REST, replacing the current offline placeholder behavior.
Apply a purple color theme across the entire app (all pages and buttons) without changing other UI/screens/features.

projectName: Restore working real OCR (OCR.space) while keeping v18 app unchanged + ensure purple theme everywhere
